tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConnectionProfilesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new connection profile in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConnectionProfilesList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all connection profiles in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesApply
tools.description: Applies draft tree onto a specific destination database.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesCommit
tools.description: Marks all the data in the conversion workspace as committed.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesConvert
tools.description: Creates a draft tree schema for the destination database.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new conversion workspace in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesDescribeConversionWorkspaceRevisions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of committed revisions of a specific conversion workspace.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesDescribeDatabaseEntities
tools.description: Describes the database entities tree for a specific conversion workspace and a specific tree type. Database entities are not resources like conversion workspaces or mapping rules, and they can't be created, updated or deleted. Instead, they are simple data objects describing the structure of the client database.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesList
tools.description: Lists conversion workspaces in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesMappingRulesImport
tools.description: Imports the mapping rules for a given conversion workspace. Supports various formats of external rules files.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesRollback
tools.description: Rolls back a conversion workspace to the last committed snapshot.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesSearchBackgroundJobs
tools.description: Searches/lists the background jobs for a specific conversion workspace. The background jobs are not resources like conversion workspaces or mapping rules, and they can't be created, updated or deleted. Instead, they are a way to expose the data plane jobs log.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsConversionWorkspacesSeed
tools.description: Imports a snapshot of the source database into the conversion workspace.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsFetchStaticIps
tools.description: Fetches a set of static IP addresses that need to be allowlisted by the customer when using the static-IP connectivity method.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new migration job in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsGenerateSshScript
tools.description: Generate a SSH configuration script to configure the reverse SSH connectivity.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsList
tools.description: Lists migration jobs in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsPatch
tools.description: Updates the parameters of a single migration job.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsPromote
tools.description: Promote a migration job, stopping replication to the destination and promoting the destination to be a standalone database.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsRestart
tools.description: Restart a stopped or failed migration job, resetting the destination instance to its original state and starting the migration process from scratch.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsResume
tools.description: Resume a migration job that is currently stopped and is resumable (was stopped during CDC phase).

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsStart
tools.description: Start an already created migration job.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsStop
tools.description: Stops a running migration job.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsMigrationJobsVerify
tools.description: Verify a migration job, making sure the destination can reach the source and that all configuration and prerequisites are met.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new private connection in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a single Database Migration Service private connection.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsGet
tools.description: Gets details of a single private connection.

tools.name: projects.datamigrationProjectsLocationsPrivateConnectionsList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of private connections in a given project and location.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
